command:
set -e

echo "=== STEP 1: ACL on /home/jose ==="
sudo setfacl -m u:git:x /home/jose
getfacl /home/jose

echo "=== STEP 2: namei full path ==="
namei -l /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini

echo "=== STEP 3: chown gitea data to git ==="
sudo chown -R git:git /home/jose/gitea
ls -lah /home/jose/gitea/
ls -lah /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/

echo "=== STEP 4: backup app.ini ==="
sudo cp /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini.bak
echo "backup done"

echo "=== STEP 5: fix Docker paths in app.ini ==="
sudo sed -i "s|/data/|/home/jose/gitea/data/|g" /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini
echo "sed done"

echo "=== STEP 6: verify key paths in app.ini ==="
grep -E "WORK_PATH|ROOT =|APP_DATA_PATH|^PATH|ROOT_PATH|PROVIDER_CONFIG|AVATAR|ATTACHMENT|INDEXER|LFS" /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini

echo "=== STEP 7: restart gitea ==="
sudo systemctl restart gitea
sleep 5
sudo systemctl status gitea --no-pager -l

echo "=== STEP 8: recent logs ==="
sudo journalctl -u gitea -n 30 --no-pager
